external_prompt.intro: Copy this task into another AI chat. Ask it to create a .json file named mnemosyne_problems.json, or output only that file's raw JSON contents for Mnemosyne's Direct JSON box. Add your topic or constraints at the end; a short "User request:" line is recommended but not required.

opening_instructions: Use Direct JSON when another AI chat will generate Mnemosyne problem JSON for you.
1. Copy the prompt above into Gemini, DeepSeek, ChatGPT, or a local model.
2. Add your own topic, source notes, difficulty, and number of problems at the end. You can write "User request:" first, but plain natural language is fine too.
3. Ask the model to create a .json file. If it cannot attach a file, it must output only the raw JSON file contents: one problem object, an array, or {"problems": [...]} for multiple problems.
4. Paste the generated .json file contents into this Direct JSON box, or attach the .json file, then press Send.
5. If it fails, copy the verifier feedback and ask the same model to fix the JSON.
In this mode, explanations from the model are not useful here. Do not copy chat prose. Paste only JSON file contents or upload a .json file.

accepted_message.title: Accept
accepted_message.next: Review the preview on the right. If it matches your intent, press Commit.
accepted_message.instruction: The verifier accepted this draft. You can still edit the JSON externally and paste a new version, or press Commit to add the validated problem(s) to the library.

verifier_chat.title: Needs fixes
next_steps: Copy the verifier feedback and send it to the same AI chat that made the JSON.
Then paste only the corrected JSON here and press Send again.

notifications.checking_json: Checking JSON with the deterministic verifier...
notifications.paste_json_first: Paste raw JSON or upload a .json file first.
notifications.direct_json_only: Direct JSON mode only accepts raw JSON text or a .json file.
notifications.json_loaded: Loaded {fileName}. Press Send to run the deterministic verifier.

practice.run_to_see_results: Run your code to see test results.
practice.run_to_see_errors: Run your code to see program errors.
practice.no_visible_tests: No visible tests for this problem.

manager.input_changed: Input changed. Click Outputs to regenerate expected outputs from the reference solution. Commit/Verify will also correct stale outputs.
